Definition: Gyrification index — ratio of the total (inner + buried) cortical contour to the superficially exposed (outer) contour, measured on coronal sections; GI = 1 means no folding, higher = more folded. Whole-cortex value.
Note: Table 1 gives 1–3 GI values per species, each from a different source reference; kept as separate rows.
Source Note: GI method after Zilles et al. 1988/1989; per-value method in GI_method / Ref (footnote a)

Definition: Brain size as printed in Table 1 (column header "Brain (volume, weight)"); a mixed volume-or-weight figure (cm3 or g depending on source), not standardised. Use for ordering only, not as a harmonised volume.
Note: Unit ambiguous by design in the source table
Source Note: Compiled brain size belongs to the volume merge; kept here as context only

Definition: Source-reference bracket code as printed in Table 1 ([4] [5] [7] [87]); identifies the GI measurement's origin and method.
Human-readable expansion of the Ref code's GI measurement method (footnote a).
